UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF APR-21-2016, NOTICE OF DEFAULT PROVE UP HEARING GRANTED PER WRITTEN ORDER. ANDREW CANTOR, ESQ., APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF MARK L. WEBB. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ADAM V. SCHWARTZ. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: A. MOK. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY CSR: MITCH LYON, CSR#6840. (514)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ADAM SCHWARTZ'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO MAY 27, 2016 AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302 BY AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ADAM SCHWARTZ' MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. MR. SCHWARTZ HAS SHOWN EXCUSABLE NEGLECT PER CCP 473 AND GRANTING THE MOTION IS SUPPORTED BY CALIFORNIA'S STRONG PUBLIC POLICY OF DECIDING CASES ON THEIR MERITS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976.

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-27-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tenative ruling. DEFENDANT ADAM SCHWARTZ' MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is granted. Mr. Schwartz has shown excusable neglect per CCP 473 and granting the motion is supported by California's strong public policy of deciding cases on their merits. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-16-2016 Continued To May-27-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANT ADAM SCHWARTZ'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is continued to May 27, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 by agreement of the parties.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Andrew Cantor, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MARK L. WEBB, sworn and examined,
No appearance by defaulted defendant ADAM V. SCHWARTZ,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

IT IS ADJUDGED, ORDERED AND DECREED that plaintiff have judgment in his favor as the sole relief prayed for herein. Plaintiff is entitled to retain the fees he earned pursuant to the Fee Agreement entered 2/3/2010. This judgment supersedes the March 25,2015 non-binding arbitration award.

Judgment signed in open court.
